title: norna borealis var. americana
intro: Norna borealis var. americana, also known as American Yarrow or Western Yarrow, is a flowering plant native to North America that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Norna borealis var. americana include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps, and supporting digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and tinctures, can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with a solvent like ethanol, and can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
